manifestVersion.description: The version of this manifest. It is used when loading a manifest to ensure the CLI version is able to parse this manifest.

name.description: The name of the project - if 'path' is not set the name will be used as path

type.description: The type of project - either a 'simple' project folder containing configs

path.description: The file path to the project folder

projects.description: A list of projects that will be deployed with this manifest

name.description: The name of the group - this can be freely defined and will be used in logs
The name of the environment - this can be freely defined and will be used in logs

type.description: The type of this value - either an 'environment' variable to read

value.description: The value is depending on 'type' either the name of an environment variable to load or just a string value.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

token.description: An access token used for Dynatrace Config API calls - for classic APIs this is required.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

clientId.description: The ID of the oAuth client credentials used to request bearer-tokens for authenticated API calls.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

clientSecret.description: The secret of the oAuth client credentials used to request bearer-tokens for authenticated API calls.

type.description: The type of this value - either an 'environment' variable to read

value.description: The value is depending on 'type' either the name of an environment variable to load or just a string value.

tokenEndpoint.description: This allows to optionally define a non-standard endpoint to request bearer tokens from.

oAuth.description: OAuth client credentials used for Dynatrace Platform API calls - for platform environments this or a platform token is required.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

platformToken.description: A platform token used for Dynatrace Platform API calls - for platform environments this or OAuth is required.

auth.description: This defines all information required for authenticated access to the environment's API.

items.description: Environment defines all required information for accessing a Dynatrace environment

environments.description: The environments that are part of this group.

items.description: Group defines a group of Environment

environmentGroups.description: A list of environment groups that configs in the defined 'projects' will be deployed to. Required when deploying environment configurations.

name.description: The name of the account - this can be freely defined and will show up in logs

type.description: The type of this value - either an 'environment' variable to read

value.description: The value is depending on 'type' either the name of an environment variable to load or just a string value.

accountUUID.description: The uuid of your account - you can find this in the Account Management UI.

type.description: The type of this value - either an 'environment' variable to read

value.description: The value is depending on 'type' either the name of an environment variable to load or just a string value.

apiUrl.description: Allows to optionally define a different Account Management API URL.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

clientId.description: The ID of the oAuth client credentials used to request bearer-tokens for authenticated API calls.

type.description: Type exists for future compatibility - AuthSecrets are always read from 'environment' variables

name.description: Name of the environment variable to read the secret from.

clientSecret.description: The secret of the oAuth client credentials used to request bearer-tokens for authenticated API calls.

type.description: The type of this value - either an 'environment' variable to read

value.description: The value is depending on 'type' either the name of an environment variable to load or just a string value.

tokenEndpoint.description: This allows to optionally define a non-standard endpoint to request bearer tokens from.

oAuth.description: OAuth client credentials to authenticate API calls for this account.

accounts.description: A list of of accounts that account resources defined in 'projects' will be deployed to. Required when deploying account resources.
